DECLARATION OF LAWRENCE D. MURRAY (TRANSACTION ID # 210079127) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NOUAUX, ALEXANDER JACQUES

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAY-28-2024 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER NOUAUX'S MOTION FOR ISSUANCE OF OSC AND APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO STRIKE LIENS, ALT, SET LIEN AMOUNTS FOR ALL LIEN CLAIMANTS, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S "MOTION FOR ISSUANCE OF AN ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE AND APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO STRIKE LIENS, OR ALTERNATIVELY, SET LIEN AMOUNTS FOR ALL LIEN CLAIMANTS" IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF CITES NO AUTHORITY FOR SUCH PROCEEDINGS AND THE COURT KNOWS OF NONE. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

Off Calendar Jul-09-2024 Continued To Oct-08-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Lawrence Murray, Esq., appearing for the plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to October 08, 2024 at 10:30 am in Department 610. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-25-2023 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-23-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Issuance Of Osc And Application For Order To Strike Liens, Alt, Set Lien Amounts For All Lien Claimants
Off Calendar May-28-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. LAWRENCE MURRAY, Esq. of Murray & Associates (tel: 415-673-0555) for Plaintiff.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER NOUAUX's Motion For Issuance Of Osc And Application For Order To Strike Liens, Alt, Set Lien Amounts For All Lien Claimants.

Matter discussed. The Court states the motion is denied without prejudice. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's "motion for issuance of an order to show cause and application for order to strike liens, or alternatively, set lien amounts for all lien claimants" is denied without prejudice. Plaintiff cites no authority for such proceedings and the court knows of none.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
